com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXDiagramBaseObject

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXArc, IXCircle, IXCurve, IXDiagramBaseInstance, IXDiagramCompoundObject, IXDiagramInstance, IXDiagramObject, IXDrillPoint, IXGraphicDatum, IXGraphicGroup, IXGraphicObject, IXGraphicSymbol, IXHarnessDiagramAxialDimension, IXHarnessDiagramBundle, IXHarnessDiagramFixture, IXHarnessDiagramNodeDimension, IXHarnessDiagramObject, IXHarnessDiagramRegion, IXLogicDiagramAssembly, IXLogicDiagramBasePin, IXLogicDiagramConductor, IXLogicDiagramDaisyChain, IXLogicDiagramHighway, IXLogicDiagramMultiCore, IXLogicDiagramObject, IXLogicDiagramPin, IXLogicDiagramPinList, IXLogicDiagramStackedPin, IXPolygon, IXPolyline, IXRectangle, IXText

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXDiagramBaseObject
    Base Interface to represent all diagram objects.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXDiagram getDiagram()
      Get the owner diagram of the object.
      IXZoneInfo getZoneInfo()
      Get the zone in which this diagram object is located in the diagram.

    • Method Detail

      • getDiagram

        IXDiagram getDiagram()
        Get the owner diagram of the object. It may return Null if the diagram is not loaded.
        Returns:
        IXDiagram

      • getZoneInfo

        IXZoneInfo getZoneInfo()
        Get the zone in which this diagram object is located in the diagram.
        Returns:
        the zone info if it exists, null otherwise.
